label: zero
gloss: the natural number zero; the base point of the successor structure.
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: the honest NSM rendering of zero-ness is sentential negation (NOT + THERE-IS), a clause pattern, not a thing-concept; forcing an InstanceSchema would reify absence. See empty-set-nat for the containment-flavoured attempt.
